name: Meme Token Payment Agent
description: Prepares allowlisted SOL or token payment configuration for signals, room access, APIs, or copy fees while keeping USDC as the default.
degenPitch: Let communities pay in their coin later, but keep the allowlist doing the adult work.
whatItDoes: Models accepted payment assets for USDC, SOL, or allowlisted tokens.
Marks meme token payments as allowlist-gated.
Keeps hidden fees and high-risk token payments out of default Public Beta flows.
cursorPrompt: Build a Meme Token Payment Agent with DNA x402. Keep USDC default, model SOL/token payments as allowlisted config only, show conversion mode and fee waterfall, and reject hidden fees or unallowlisted high-risk tokens.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Meme Token Payment Agent with DNA x402. Keep USDC default, model SOL/token payments as allowlisted config only, show conversion mode and fee waterfall, and reject hidden fees or unallowlisted high-risk tokens.
receiptProofBehavior: Meme token payment path requires allowlist.
